panels.description: The vendor, family and model information of the storage system
panels.title: Vendor and Model

panels.description: The current estimated internal temperature of the storage system.
panels.title: Ambient Temperature

panels.description:
The number of degrees Celsius (°C) remaining before the temperature reaches the closest warning temperature threshold of the host.

A value of 0 indicates a critical temperature.
panels.title: Heating Margin

targets.expr:
(
  rate(storage_operations_total{host_name="$host_name", storage_type="storage_system", storage_io_direction="read"}[5m]) 
/ ignoring(storage_io_direction)
  sum without(storage_io_direction) (
    rate(storage_operations_total{host_name="$host_name", storage_type="storage_system"}[5m])
  )
) unless sum(rate(storage_operations_total{host_name="$host_name", storage_type="storage_system"}[5m])) == 0

sourceQuery.expr:
(
  rate(storage.operations{host.name="$host_name", storage.type="storage_system", storage.io.direction="read"}[5m]) 
/ ignoring(storage.io.direction)
  sum without(storage.io.direction) (
    rate(storage.operations{host.name="$host_name", storage.type="storage_system"}[5m])
  )
) unless sum(rate(storage.operations{host.name="$host_name", storage.type="storage_system"}[5m])) == 0

targets.expr:
(
  rate(storage_operations_total{host_name="$host_name", storage_type="storage_system", storage_io_direction="write"}[5m]) 
/ ignoring(storage_io_direction)
  sum without(storage_io_direction) (
    rate(storage_operations_total{host_name="$host_name", storage_type="storage_system"}[5m])
  )
) unless sum(rate(storage_operations_total{host_name="$host_name", storage_type="storage_system"}[5m])) == 0

sourceQuery.expr:
(
  rate(storage.operations{host.name="$host_name", storage.type="storage_system", storage.io.direction="write"}[5m]) 
/ ignoring(storage.io.direction)
  sum without(storage.io.direction) (
    rate(storage.operations{host.name="$host_name", storage.type="storage_system"}[5m])
  )
) unless sum(rate(storage.operations{host.name="$host_name", storage.type="storage_system"}[5m])) == 0

# Sum is used to strip all labels
sum(storage.provisioning{host.name="$host_name", storage.type="storage_system", storage.provisioning.state="subscribed"})
/
sum(storage.limit{host.name="$host_name", storage.type="storage_system"})

sourceQuery.query: severity:CRITICAL AND status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND source_hostname.keyword:$host_name
severity:MAJOR AND status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND source_hostname.keyword:$host_name
severity:MINOR AND status:OPEN AND !status:BLACKOUT AND source_hostname.keyword:$host_name

panels.description:
Shows how consumed volume space is distributed across two categories:

Reclaimable Capacity (unmapped or inactive): Volumes that are either not mapped to any host, or mapped but have recorded no read/write operations over the selected time range. 

Active Consumed Consumed: Volumes that are mapped to a host and have demonstrated I/O activity within the selected time range.

targets.expr:
# Total consumed capacity of all volumes
sum(storage_usage_bytes{host_name=~"$host_name", storage_type="volume", storage_provisioning_state="used"})

sourceQuery.expr:
# Total consumed capacity of all volumes
sum(storage.usage{host.name=~"$host_name", storage.type="volume", storage.provisioning.state="used"})

panels.title: Reclaimable Consumed Capacity
NetApp Volumes  (activity from ${__from:date:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm} to ${__to:date:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm})
